# Astro Static Website Project

This project is an Astro-based static website created for integrating HTML templates from Envato.

## Project Setup Progress

- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements

- [x] Scaffold the Project

- [x] Customize the Project

- [x] Install Required Extensions

- [x] Compile the Project

- [x] Create and Run Task

- [x] Launch the Project

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete

## Development Guidelines

- Use Astro framework for static site generation
- Integrate HTML templates from Envato marketplace
- Focus on performance and static content delivery
- Maintain clean component structure for template integration
